docs.text: simple-pip A simple Chrome extension to pop out videos. Installation Download the latest release and unzip it Open Chrome's extension page (chrome://extensions) Make sure developer mode is enabled on the top right so you can load the extension Select Load extension Select the release folder's src directory

docs.title: via main branch

docs.text: Extension instructions Using the extension To enter Picture-in-Picture mode, click the extension icon. It will pop out the largest video on the page you're currently viewing. To exit Picture-in-Picture mode, click the icon again. If a video is in picture-in-picture mode, it will pop back into Chrome. Using light mode icons If you use Chrome Light Mode, a set of supplementary icons are available under the light-mode-icons branch. Download the light mode icons branch and unzip it Make sure you have the latest release downloaded Before installing the extension, replace the images in /assets with the ones you downloaded Now you can install the extension! simple-pip A simple Chrome extension to pop out videos.
docs.title: Extension instructions

docs.text: To enter Picture-in-Picture mode, click the extension icon. It will pop out the largest video on the page you're currently viewing. To exit Picture-in-Picture mode, click the icon again. If a video is in picture-in-picture mode, it will pop back into Chrome.

docs.text: If you use Chrome Light Mode, a set of supplementary icons are available under the light-mode-icons branch. Download the light mode icons branch and unzip it Make sure you have the latest release downloaded Before installing the extension, replace the images in /assets with the ones you downloaded Now you can install the extension!
